name: fotogrids/fotogrids
description: FotoGrids - WordPress gallery and slider plugin (Free).

scripts-descriptions.lint: Run PHP_CodeSniffer over the plugin using src/phpcs.xml.
scripts-descriptions.lint:summary: Run phpcs with a per-file summary report.
scripts-descriptions.lint:fix: Auto-fix what PHP Code Beautifier can fix in place.
scripts-descriptions.lint:compat: Check PHP 8.0+ compatibility of src/ with PHPCompatibilityWP.
